name: single_choice
description: Present options and let the user pick one.

parameters.name: allow_custom
parameters.description: Allow user to provide custom input.

usage_guidance: Use when there are distinct alternatives to choose from.
examples: {"tool_type": "single_choice", "prompt": "Which optimization strategy?", "choices": [{"label": "Memory", "value": "memory", "description": "Reduce memory footprint"}, {"label": "Latency", "value": "latency", "description": "Reduce inference time"}], "allow_custom": true}
